description:
## Component: hx-radio-group (UPGRADE)
**Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 6/6 libraries**

Upgrade existing scaffold. Mutually exclusive option selection with full keyboard navigation and Drupal Form API integration.

### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Form Component)
Properties control selected value and validation. Slots accept hx-radio children rendered by Drupal TWIG.

### API Design
**Properties:** `name`, `value` (selected), `required`, `disabled`, `label`, `error`, `orientation` (horizontal|vertical)
**Slots:** Default (hx-radio children), `label`, `help`, `error`
**CSS Parts:** `group`, `label`, `help-text`, `error-message`
**Events:** `hx-change` (composed: true, detail: { value })

### Drupal Integration
```twig
<hx-radio-group name="gender" required>
  Gender
  <hx-radio slot="options" value="male" {% if default == 'male' %}checked{% endif %}>Male</hx-radio>
  <hx-radio slot="options" value="female" {% if default == 'female' %}checked{% endif %}>Female</hx-radio>
  <hx-radio slot="options" value="other">Other</hx-radio>
  <hx-radio slot="options" value="prefer-not-to-say">Prefer not to say</hx-radio>
</hx-radio-group>
```

### ElementInternals: Submits selected radio value
### Healthcare: Gender, insurance type, priority level, yes/no questions

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Only one radio selected at a time (mutual exclusion)
2. Keyboard: Arrow keys move selection, Tab moves focus out
3. ElementInternals form participation
4. Drupal renders radio options from PHP arrays/taxonomy
5. WCAG 2.1 AA: radiogroup role, roving tabindex
title: T1-11: hx-radio-group — Mutually Exclusive Selection
